Title: Review page shows confusing band-name fallback text
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Go to /book, pick Rehearsal. 2. Pick any open date/slot. 3. On Details step, leave Band/Artist Name blank, fill Contact Name with e.g. 'QA Test Band'. 4. Continue to Review step.
Expected: Band/Artist field on review shows a clear placeholder (e.g. an em dash or 'No band name') when left blank.
Actual: Band/Artist shows '<Contact Name> (no band name)' -- e.g. 'QA Test Band (no band name)' -- reusing the contact name value with a confusing parenthetical suffix.
Notes: src/components/booking/ReviewSummary.tsx:84-86 (displayBand fallback). Pre-existing, not introduced by any 2026-07-21 plan. Cosmetic/confusing only -- band_name is correctly stored as NULL in the DB (verified via direct query), this is a display-only issue.
